latestIgtvVideos.caption: It’s been a HUGE summer for @jlo for a lot of reasons, but her most recent cause to celebrate is the release of @jlobeauty’s new body product, the Firm + Flaunt Targeted Booty Balm 🍑 We had a chance to catch up with her live in last week’s Beauty Chat Room. Tune in next week for more industry tea 🫖

We had two guests on this week’s Beauty Chat Room, @mikaylajmakeup and everyone’s favorite honey bear 🧸️ Mikayla shared her hair journey and let us know that the @briogeo Vegan Apple Honey Deep Conditioning Hair Maskis coming back one last time! Tune in next Tuesday for another episode ✨

“When I’m dancing, everything stops for a second, and I think about all of those before me, all of those after me. I feel like I’m at the right place at the right time.”

Thank you for sharing your story with us, Brennah (@brennahwah). You bring so much beauty to the world 🌎

Join us as we chat with Girls, Inc., our charity partner for the month of August. @girlsinc is dedicated to supporting and encouraging a new generation of female leaders as they grow up smart, bold, and strong.
Good things always come in threes, including these intergalactic space buns from Sephora team member @makememaldonado 👽
Watch Sephora hair goddess, a.k.a. Beauty Director @ladyymelinda, show off how to bring these ’40s-inspired victory rolls to the modern era.

“When I got behind that steering wheel, baby, it was over. I felt like I was in my lane.”

It’s official. We’re taking several pages out of Clarissa’s (@iamclarissarankin) book. Thanks for sharing your story and showing us how fully you live your life ❤️️
Hop into your time machine 🌀 and feel all the 2000s emo vibes with this throwback look from #SephoraSquad member @jessiejoemonge.
Bring the runway to your everyday ✨ Get into this easy editorial makeup look from Sephora Beauty Director @helenkphillips.

We’re practically bubbling over with excitement 🛁

You’re staring at @tatcha The Rice Wash Skin-Softening Cleanser 👀 #OddlySatisfying
